title: Active Directory BloodHound
html:
Active Directory BloodHound

RDP to lab target

xfreerdp /v:<target IP address> /u:htb-student /p:<password>

Run the SharpHound C# ingestor

.\SharpHound.exe -c all --zipfilename inlanefreight_bloodhound

Run the SharpHound PowerShell ingestor

Invoke-BloodHound -CollectionMethod all -ZipFileName ilfreight_bloodhound

Run bloodhound-python

bloodhound-python -dc <DC> -gc <GC> -d <DOMAIN -c All -u <user>

Transfer data to and from the target host with drive redirection

xfreerdp /v:<target-ip> /u:htb-student /drive:data,/tmp
